features.label: Why Choose Us
features.title: A Resort That Redefines Luxury
features.subtitle: Every detail at Serenity Sands is crafted for your comfort, relaxation, and unforgettable memories.

card1.title: Beachfront Location
card1.description: Situated directly on Goa's pristine coastline with private beach access and breathtaking ocean views from every room.

card2.title: Award-Winning Dining
card2.description: Six restaurant concepts serving authentic Indian cuisine, fresh seafood, and international favourites with panoramic sea views.

card3.title: Signature Spa & Wellness
card3.description: Our award-winning spa offers Ayurvedic treatments, yoga sessions, and holistic therapies to restore body and mind.
card3.linkAriaLabel: Discover our spa and wellness services

card4.title: Infinity Pool & Recreation
card4.description: Swim in our stunning infinity pool overlooking the Arabian Sea. Enjoy guided nature walks, water sports, and more.

card5.title: Family & Group Packages
card5.description: Tailored packages for families, couples, and corporate retreats. Dedicated concierge service for every group.

card6.title: Safe & Secure Stay
card6.description: 24/7 security, CCTV surveillance, and a dedicated guest safety team ensure complete peace of mind throughout your stay.
card6.linkAriaLabel: Learn more about our safety measures

services.label: Our Services
services.title: Everything You Need for a Perfect Stay
services.subtitle: From world-class rooms to curated experiences, every service at Serenity Sands is designed to exceed expectations.

card1.title: Luxury Rooms & Suites
card1.description: Spacious and elegantly designed rooms with modern amenities, ocean-view balconies, and premium comfort for every guest.
card1.ctaAriaLabel: View our luxury rooms and suites

card2.title: Multi-Cuisine Dining
card2.description: Savour a variety of Indian and international dishes prepared by experienced chefs using the freshest local ingredients.

card3.title: Spa & Wellness Centre
card3.description: Relax and rejuvenate with professional Ayurvedic spa treatments, sunrise yoga sessions, and holistic wellness therapies.
card3.ctaAriaLabel: Book a spa or wellness session

card4.title: Recreational Activities
card4.description: Swimming pool, guided nature walks, water sports, indoor games, and outdoor adventures for guests of all ages.

card5.title: Events & Celebrations
card5.description: Host weddings, corporate retreats, and private events in our stunning beachfront venues with dedicated planning support.

card6.title: Airport & Transfers
card6.description: Complimentary airport pickup, private chauffeur services, and curated local excursion packages for all guests.

products.label: Room Rates
products.title: Find Your Perfect Room
products.subtitle: Each room is designed for comfort and style. All rates include breakfast, beach access, and resort amenities.

testimonials.label: Guest Reviews
testimonials.title: What Our Guests Say
testimonials.subtitle: Over 5,000 five-star reviews from guests who found their perfect escape at Serenity Sands.

card1.quote: Beautiful resort with amazing hospitality. The rooms were incredibly comfortable and the staff went above and beyond to make our stay special.
card1.name: Rohit Sharma

card2.quote: Perfect place for a peaceful getaway. Loved the food, the spa services, and the absolutely stunning scenic surroundings. We'll be back!
card2.name: Ananya Sen

card3.quote: A fantastic resort experience from check-in to check-out. Clean rooms, great amenities, and an incredibly relaxing atmosphere by the sea.
card3.name: Vikram Mehta

card4.quote: We hosted our company offsite here and it was seamless. The event team handled everything perfectly, and the beach venue was breathtaking.
card4.name: Priya Nair

card5.quote: The spa treatments were world-class. I came exhausted and left completely refreshed. The Ayurvedic massage was unlike anything I have experienced.
card5.name: Arjun Kapoor

card6.quote: Our honeymoon was absolutely magical here. The team surprised us with flowers and a cake вҖ” those thoughtful touches made it truly unforgettable.
card6.name: Meera Joshi
